files.description: The repo's operating contract: two-catalog system, build pipeline, validator + kernel-SSoT posture, do-not-flip soak discipline, required SKILL.md frontmatter, and the canonical identifiers that must never be renamed.
Session protocol — post-compaction recovery, end-of-session push checklist, beads workflow.
The NON-NEGOTIABLES: the 8-field ALWAYS_REQUIRED set, marketplace-tier error-vs-warning semantics, and which changes are approval-gated.
The authoritative prose-spec validator — the canonical merge gate for frontmatter and markdown body sections, plus the kernel-strict agent gate.
The CI gate definitions: plugin structure, catalog invariants, README-TOC sync, and the lint/test matrix.
The marketplace design constitution — OKLCH-only colors, the Data-Dense Pro family, and explicitly rejected UI patterns.
The IS enterprise / marketplace skills standard (v3.x) that the validator enforces.
